id.description: Storage namespace prefix for persistent stores (locale/theme/fav/etc.).

theme.description: Default DaisyUI theme name used when no persisted theme exists (e.g. 'dim', 'light').

translate.description: Item field names whose English body text is machine-translated to the active locale (via the runtime's cached, fail-open translator). Use for API content that isn't localized at source, e.g. Hacker News titles: ["title"]. Chrome/UI strings must still be authored in the i18n dicts.

fav.description: Enables favorites/bookmark feature. When present, at least one tab should set source:'fav'.

key.description: Item field name used as the unique favorites key. MUST be a non-empty field present on every item.

icon.description: Iconify icon for the profile avatar.

permissions.description: Show a history-backed Permissions screen (a row in the profile) with a toggle per listed permission; enabling triggers the native prompt.

label.description: i18n key for the row label (display uses fixed 'profSource', but kept for documentation).

url.description: External URL opened in a new tab.

icon.description: Iconify icon for the source row.

detail.description: In-app drill-down page. When present, tapping a list card opens a full-screen detail overlay (instead of card.href). All slot fields are item keys unless noted; row/action labels are i18n keys. Needs i18n key 'back'.

image.description: OPTIONAL item field — hero image URL (16:9).

title.description: REQUIRED item field — page + app-bar title.

subtitle.description: OPTIONAL item field — under the title.

rows.description: Fact rows; a row whose field resolves empty/null is dropped.

label.description: i18n key for the row label.

field.description: Item field for the row value (pre-joined to a string in data.js).

actions.description: External link buttons at the bottom of the detail page.

icon.description: Iconify icon for the action button.

label.description: i18n key for the action label.

href.description: Item field holding the URL (opened in a new tab; sanitized).

filters.description: Filter sheet definition. Presence renders the filter button + bottom sheet.

defaults.description: Initial filter state. Keys SHOULD match controls[].key.

refetch.description: If true, pressing Apply re-runs data.load(filters).

controls.description: Filter controls rendered in the sheet.

key.description: Filter state key written into S.filters; referenced by clientFilters[].key and section.labelParams.

label.description: i18n key for the control label.

icon.description: Iconify icon shown beside the control.

iconCls.description: Optional extra CSS classes for the toggle icon.

optionsFrom.description: For type:'select' — meta key on data.meta holding [{v,l},...] options. The data loader MUST populate meta[optionsFrom].

options.description: For type:'segment' — array of [value, labelKey] pairs.

prefixItems.description: Option value written into filter state.
i18n key (or literal) for the option label.

refetch.description: Documents that changing this control should trigger a refetch (filters.refetch drives actual reload on Apply).

chip.description: If true and the filter is active, show a removable chip above the list.

tabs.description: Bottom-dock tabs. Must contain at least one tab; tabs[0] is the initial tab.

type.description: Renderer: list -> ListView, converter -> ConverterView, profile -> Profile, dashboard -> DashboardView, tool -> a custom app-supplied view (sensor/instrument apps).

view.description: tool only — key into the views map passed to start(spec, { views }); names the app's custom Preact component (the irreducible interactive visual).

needs.description: tool only (OPTIONAL) — hardware capabilities the view uses (e.g. ['haptic','geo','camera']); documents intent / drives permission priming.

icon.description: Iconify icon for the dock button.

label.description: i18n key for the dock label.

titleKey.description: i18n key for the app-bar title when this tab is active (defaults to 'title').

search.description: list only — show the search/status bar.

searchFetch.description: list only (search family) — the search box debounce-drives a real refetch: the trimmed query reaches data.js load() as filters.q, and client-side filtering is skipped (the server already searched). Empty query shows the `prompt` empty-state. Requires search:true.

prompt.description: searchFetch only — the empty-state shown before the user has typed a query (distinct from `empty`, which is 'no results').

text.description: i18n key for the prompt title (defaults to 'searchPrompt').

hint.description: i18n key for the prompt hint (defaults to 'searchPromptHint').

searchKey.description: i18n key for the search placeholder (defaults to 'search').

statusKey.description: i18n key for the status line under the search bar (defaults to 'status'); interpolated with {date, ...meta}.

source.description: If 'fav', the list reads from saved favorites instead of data.items.

banner.description: Dismissible info banner above the list.

titleKey.description: i18n key for bold lead text.

clientFilters.description: Client-side filters applied when their filter key is truthy.

key.description: Filter state key (must match a filters.controls[].key).

sections.description: Optional grouping of list items into labeled sections by a test() filter.

icon.description: Iconify icon for the section header.

label.description: i18n key for the section header.

accent.description: Highlight the section header/count in primary color.

hideBadge.description: Badge key to suppress on cards inside this section.

labelParams.description: Filter state key whose value is interpolated into the label as {cat}.

layout.description: row -> compact rates row; feed -> rich card.

image.description: feed layout (OPTIONAL) — item field with an image URL; renders a 16:9 figure atop the card (media/gallery).

imageFit.description: image fit (default 'cover' = fill+crop; 'contain' = whole image matted, for art/posters).

href.description: Item field name holding the URL; makes the card a link. Field must exist on items.

lead.description: row layout — item field shown in the bold left column.

title.description: Item field name for the card title/heading.

subtitle.description: feed layout — item field for the subtitle.

trailing.description: row layout — item field for the right-aligned value.

unit.description: row layout — unit suffix appended to the numerically-formatted trailing value.

trend.description: row layout (OPTIONAL) — item field with a signed % change; rendered green (up) / red (down) under the trailing value.

more.description: feed layout — i18n key for the 'details' call-to-action.

meta.description: feed layout — footer meta: an item field name, OR { field, format:'ago' } for a locale-aware relative date (needs i18n agoToday/agoYesterday/agoDays/agoWeeks).

body.description: feed layout — item field for the clamped body text.

badges.description: Badges shown on the card. Each badge is either field-driven (field) or condition-driven (when+label).

key.description: Badge identity; can be targeted by section.hideBadge.

when.description: test() expression; renders label badge when truthy.

field.description: Item field whose value (string or array) is rendered as badge text.

label.description: i18n key for the badge text (used with 'when').

icon.description: Iconify icon, prepended to the badge (works with both 'when' and 'field' badges).

empty.description: Empty-state override for a list tab.

text.description: i18n key for the empty title (defaults to 'noResults').

hint.description: i18n key for the empty hint (defaults to 'noResultsHint').

codeField.description: converter only — item field holding the currency/unit code.

rateField.description: converter only — item field holding the numeric rate.

base.description: converter only — base code with implicit rate 1 (e.g. 'UAH').

hero.description: dashboard only — the big glanceable block. Reads data.meta (a flattened current-conditions object).

place.description: OPTIONAL meta field — small location line above the icon (becomes a tappable city picker when top-level filters exist).

icon.description: OPTIONAL meta field holding an iconify icon name (big glyph).

value.description: REQUIRED meta field — the big number.

unit.description: OPTIONAL literal suffix appended to the big value.

caption.description: OPTIONAL meta field — text under the value.

metrics.description: OPTIONAL labeled stat chips (hidden at watch width).

field.description: REQUIRED meta field for the chip value.

unit.description: Literal suffix on the chip value.

label.description: i18n key shown as the chip label.

strip.description: dashboard only (OPTIONAL) — a horizontal scroller reading a meta ARRAY (e.g. hourly).

from.description: REQUIRED meta key holding the array.

label.description: OPTIONAL i18n key for the section header (gets a clock icon).

icon.description: OPTIONAL item field — iconify icon name.

unit.description: OPTIONAL literal suffix on the strip value.

days.description: dashboard only (OPTIONAL) — a vertical list reading data.items.

label.description: OPTIONAL i18n key for the section header (calendar icon).

icon.description: OPTIONAL item field — iconify icon name.

lo.description: OPTIONAL item field — muted secondary value (hidden at watch width).

i18n.description: Locale dictionaries. 'en' is required as the runtime fallback. Each locale maps i18n keys to display strings; interpolation placeholders use {name} syntax.
